hidden_state.scenario_summary: Synthetic metering discrepancy where the customer-visible dashboard trails the billable meter despite healthy compute service.
latent_facts: There is no underlying compute incident.
The discrepancy is caused by lagging usage meter ingestion.
Commercial handling may require invoice correction after finance review.
likely_failure_modes: Model mistakes this for pricing configuration drift.
Model treats the visibility gap as an SLA service outage.

case_packet.title: Synthetic metering discrepancy 8

notes: Customer actively monitors the self-serve usage dashboard.

pricing_notes: Invoice preview currently reflects 272 GPU-hours of billable usage.

usage_record.telemetry_summary: Engineering confirms service health. The only issue is partial propagation in the usage meter pipeline.
anomalies: Dashboard currently trails the internal billable meter by 29 GPU-hours.

incident_record.engineering_summary: Engineering confirms service health. The only issue is partial propagation in the usage meter pipeline.

case_packet.customer_note: Please help us understand the mismatch between the dashboard and the current invoice estimate.
case_packet.policy_snippet: Usage visibility gaps should be handled as commercial review cases, not SLA remedies.
case_packet.calculator_output: Invoice preview reflects 272 GPU-hours while dashboard shows 243.
case_packet.visible_case_summary: Synthetic visibility-gap case with healthy compute service and lagging meter ingestion.

adjudication_notes: Ground truth is driven by generator logic, not note wording.
ground_truth.reference_customer_note: We found a lag in the usage meter pipeline, which is why the dashboard and invoice preview do not align yet. We are holding the case for finance review and will correct the final invoice if an adjustment is confirmed.
ground_truth.reference_internal_note: Owner: shared_revops_finance. Action: hold_for_finance_review because the billable meter is ahead of the customer-visible dashboard and invoice adjustment may be required.
